since_last: 38% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.55%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.56% · Gold +1.02% · Nasdaq100 +0.38%. 38% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.55%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.55%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -13.84%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.72%, TLN +7.28%, AMAT +6.96%, ARM +6.63%, ASML +5.98%. Laggards: SNAP -13.84%, CRNC -5.89%, AMBA -4.48%, SOUN -4.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.47% at $191.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
